name: videocat
description: Offline video catalog for external hard drives.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @videocat/shared && npm run build -w @videocat/server && npm run build -w @videocat/web && npm run build -w @videocat/agent-windows
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @videocat/shared && npm run typecheck -w @videocat/server && npm run typecheck -w @videocat/web && npm run typecheck -w @videocat/agent-windows
